entry.title: Torches of Freedom
entry.summary: After the final scene of the 2023 Ridley Scott film ‘Napoleon’, where he shows the death of Napoleon on the island of Saint Helena after his final banishment, the screen turns completely dark, and then small white letters light up with the numbers of the casualties in the French army Napoleon was responsible for, in the battles he had led. This scene was significant, for all the cunning and cra...

entry.title: Žižek on Israel-Palestine
entry.summary:
[This is a corrected transcript of this interview of Slavoj Žižek by PoliticsJoe. The hard-to-find references were contributed by Roger Ferran i Baños.]
- Slavoj Žižek, welcome back to PoliticsJoe, for those unfamiliar with who you are, how would you like to introduce yourself?
- Ah, now comes a surprise. I still advocate [for] communism, but what kind of communism? A German journalist...

entry.title: The Delusion of Green Capitalism
entry.summary:
[The following is the transcript of a part of the lecture by Slavoj Žižek at CUNY (New York) found here. Unfortunately the whole speech, which used to be here, is no longer available.]
So, there is, I claim, something deceptively reassuring in our readiness to assume full guilt and responsibility for the threats to our environment. We like to be guilty since if we are guilty it all depends...

entry.title: On Faith
entry.summary:
A lot of thoughts and ideas have been circling in my head endlessly for the last few days, and only a slow Thursday and an empty office gave me permission to put them down on paper. There’s not much direction here or development for that matter, but that is probably symptomatic of the ideas themselves.
Lately, I’ve been thinking a lot about religion and the distinction between organized and ...
